client_updates.highlight: Zeam: new image released; spec fixes pending; new image expected today or tomorrow
Ream: all 3 Ethlambda optimizations implemented and running against Ethlambda on devnet; stable with low head/finalization lag
Lantern: refactoring underway; was tracking stale lean spec commit — now updated; image cache bug fixed (optimizations were not taking effect)
Ethlambda: Grafana metrics made public; block-building fix merged; signature aggregation optimization implemented; passing all Hive spec tests
Grandine: implementing Ethlambda option 1 & 2 optimizations; lean spec fixes in progress; new image + shadow image coming soon

testing_progress.highlight: Finalization instability persists: bursts of 30–45+ min without finality despite optimizations; root causes are hardware limits and delayed aggregates
Anchal proposed additive justification workaround (cumulative vote ranges) to reduce finalization lag; trade-off is high memory use during prolonged non-finality
Hetzner doubled prices and denied additional server requests; teams exploring alternative hosting for devnets

cryptography.highlight: LeanVM binary fields: >500 XMSS aggregations/second achieved with binary fields
BN254 circuit-based approach in progress for comparison with binary field approach

documentation.highlight: SSZ spec extracted from lean spec into standalone repo; under review with consensus spec team (Justin Traglia); to be transferred to official Ethereum GitHub org

organizational.highlight: No call next week (travel); sync async; next call in two weeks

action_items.action: All teams: sync async on optimizations; next sync call in two weeks

decisions.decision: PQ Interop call skipped next week; resumes in two weeks

targets.target: Zeam: new image with spec fixes — today or early tomorrow
